source: Public Service Commission of the District of Columbia
source_note: Order of the Public Service Commission of the District of Columbia on applications for reconsideration of its Multiyear Rate Plan decision for Potomac Electric Power Company (Pepco), Formal Case No. 1176, issued January 28, 2025. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: DC PSC e-Docket, edocket.dcpsc.org (attachId 217663). DC PSC publishes on dcpsc.org (official US-government commission on .org, not .gov; admitted via the gov-guard's narrow .org allowlist).
